arts.ttl: Neuer doubtful for Bayern's clash with Augsburg
arts.sum: Speaking at a press conference on Thursday, Bayern Munich coach Vincent Kompany revealed that it's unclear whether Manuel Neuer will be able to play against Augsburg.

A Bavarian derby under the Friday evening floodlights as FCB host FCA, David vs Goliath and all that. Augsburg often tend to struggle towards the bottom reaches of the table, but have never actually...

arts.ttl: Bayern boss underlines strong desire to extend contracts of Musiala and Kimmich
arts.sum: Bayern Munich CEO Jan-Christian Dreesen has stressed the importance of extending the contracts of Jamal Musiala and Joshua Kimmich.

arts.ttl: Alphonso Davies one of Manchester United’s dream targets
arts.sum: As reported by Florian Plettenburg, Bayern Munich’s Alphonso Davies is one of Manchester United’s dream targets next summer. The Canadian international has been highly linked with a move away from…

arts.ttl: Lille President Warns David Suitors Ahead of January
arts.sum: The teams searching for a striker will have to look elsewhere because Jonathan David won’t transfer in January, even though it’ll be the final chance for his side to cash in on his departure considering his expiring contract. The post Lille President Warns David Suitors Ahead of January appeared first on The Cult of Calcio.

arts.ttl: Daily Schmankerl: Real Madrid, FC Barcelona see opening with Bayern Munich’s Joshua Kimmich; Leroy Sané eyeing December talks with Bayern; Mats Hummels on the move?; Juventus wants Joshua Zirkzee; Manchester City to extend Pep Guardiola?; and MORE!
arts.sum: Bayern Munich star Joshua Kimmich has not committed to anything for 2026 and that has given Real Madrid and FC Barcelona hope that they can lure the Germany international away to Spain: The battle for Bayern Munich’s star midfielder Joshua Kimmich is heating up, with Barcelona and Real Madrid reportedly vying for his signature on a free transfer next summer.

arts.ttl: Training Report: Snowfall at Säbener Straße; Bayern Munich star Manuel Neuer leaves training...then returns; Vincent Kompany trains; Sacha Boey says he’s ready; and MORE!
arts.sum: Säbener Straße today [ IG/João Palhinha] pic.twitter.com/GZcfwteSRm Bayern Munich returns to action on this Friday against FC Augsburg, so the boys were working hard to get back into form and rebuild the momentum that squad experienced before the break.

arts.ttl: Manchester United, Arsenal keen on signing Leroy Sané from Bayern Munich
arts.sum: Leroy Sané is beginning to attract interest from other clubs as he is rumored to be one of the players Bayern Munich is looking to offload. At the same time, the Rekordmeister is looking at some pricey players, too.

arts.ttl: Leroy Sane breaks silence on Arsenal transfer interest with telling update
arts.sum: Bayern Munich and Germany star Leroy Sane has spoken out about his future with the Bundesliga giants amid interest from Premier League sides Arsenal, Liverpool and Manchester United

arts.ttl: Daniel Peretz: A replacement for Manuel Neuer at Bayern Munich?
arts.sum: According to the same report that tells us about the transfer interest (from Kerry Hau via @iMiaSanMia ), Daniel Peretz is staying put at Bayern Munich for now, with no plans for a winter transfer. Peretz, while talented, might face a tough battle to cement his place in Bayern’s long-term plans.
